title: Multiscale pangenome graphs empower the genomic dissection of mixed-ploidy sugarcane species
author: zhang, yixing
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains the genomes used for the sugarcane super pangenome graph. Additionally, the raw methylation, ATAC, and RNA data have been uploaded to NCBI ( https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/bioproject/1353852 ) and NGDC ( https://ngdc.cncb.ac.cn/bioproject/browse/PRJCA051427 ).
steps_raw: This repository contains the genomes used for the sugarcane super pangenome graph. Additionally, the raw methylation, ATAC, and RNA data have been uploaded to NCBI ( https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/bioproject/1353852 ) and NGDC ( https://ngdc.cncb.ac.cn/bioproject/browse/PRJCA051427 ).
